description: Common Git operations from the command line.
author: colorfulDots

commands.name: Git Stage All
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && git add -A"' -e 'tell application "Terminal" to activate'
commands.description: Stage all changes in the current repository

commands.name: Git Status
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && git status"' -e 'tell application "Terminal" to activate'
commands.description: Show the working tree status in Terminal

commands.name: Git Pull
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && git pull"' -e 'tell application "Terminal" to activate'
commands.description: Pull latest changes from the remote branch

commands.name: Git Push
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && git push"' -e 'tell application "Terminal" to activate'
commands.description: Push committed changes to the remote repository

commands.name: Git Log
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && git log --oneline -20"' -e 'tell application "Terminal" to activate'
commands.description: Show the last 20 commits in a compact log
